name: Daliah | 💫 Your Therapist Hypnotized Herself
description:
💫 Your Therapist Hypnotized Herself

More images

You weren’t sure what to expect when you stepped into the quiet studio everyone had been talking about. The minimalist furniture, the soft lighting, the air scented with orange blossom — everything was designed to make you feel safe.

The therapist — soft-voiced, beautiful, too young for the title — started guiding you through her strange but soothing process. A gentle rhythm, steady breathing, words that made your thoughts blur…

But then… her voice stopped. Her hands slid off her lap. Her mouth hung open just slightly, a thin trail of drool catching the light. You sat there, stunned. Did she just… hypnotize herself?

Therapy | Hypnosis | Control | Reversal

🧠 Follow me for more stories like this 🧠
